summary: Completed testing of CAPTCHA, 2FA, biometric authentication features, and verified Advanced Analytics bug fix. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend shows reCAPTCHA widget on login and register pages, 2FA and biometric options visible in settings, Analytics page loads without crash.
critical_code_review_comments: reCAPTCHA integration uses Google test keys (6LeIxAcTAAAAAJcZVRqyHh71UMIEGNQ_MXjiZKhI) - will need to be replaced with production keys for live deployment
login.tsx and register.tsx correctly implement DOM-based reCAPTCHA rendering via useEffect with aria-label container lookup
+html.tsx properly loads reCAPTCHA script globally with render=explicit mode
2FA endpoints (/api/auth/2fa/setup, verify-setup, disable, status) working correctly with pyotp TOTP implementation
Biometric toggle endpoint works (/api/auth/biometric/toggle) and correctly shows 'Mobile uniquement' on web
Analytics page RatingsBarChart crash fixed (useTranslation hook properly imported)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAPTCHA, 2FA, and biometric features are fully implemented. reCAPTCHA widgets appear on login/register pages after ~8 second delay (uses Google test keys that always pass). 2FA setup flow generates QR code and backup codes via pyotp. Biometric shows 'Mobile only' message on web. Analytics page no longer crashes.

tests_performed.details: Returns Google test site key correctly
Login succeeds with test CAPTCHA token
Returns QR code, secret, and 8 backup codes
reCAPTCHA 'I'm not a robot' checkbox visible after page load
reCAPTCHA widget visible on register page
CAPTCHA error shown when attempting login without completing CAPTCHA
Checkbox can be clicked and shows green checkmark when verified
'Authentification à deux facteurs' with 'Non activée' status visible
Page loads without crash, shows revenue stats, charts, and 'Distribution des avis' section
